name: postman-repo
description: Postman / Newman 集合：PM testnet event list demo

scripts.pm:event-list: newman run postman/collections/pm-ce-testnet-event-list.postman_collection.json --reporters cli,json,junit,htmlextra --reporter-json-export reports/newman-event-list.json --reporter-junit-export reports/newman-event-list.xml --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-dashboard.html --reporter-htmlextra-template postman/templates/htmlextra-inline-dashboard.hbs --reporter-htmlextra-browserTitle "PM CE Newman" --reporter-htmlextra-title "PM CE · testnet" --reporter-htmlextra-noSyntaxHighlighting --reporter-htmlextra-timezone "Asia/Shanghai" && node scripts/newman-json-to-zh-html.mjs reports/newman-event-list.json reports/newman-summary-zh.html
